body:
## Rationale

Charlie Benante is a foundational figure in thrash metal — Anthrax co-founded the genre alongside Metallica, Megadeth, and Slayer. MetalForge has \`whats-in-charlie-benantes-kit\` (LLM file + gear profile) and covers the Anthrax band page, but **zero album-specific editorial article**. "Among the Living" (1987) is universally ranked among the greatest thrash albums, and "Persistence of Time" (1990) features Benante's most technical drumming.

**Query targets:**
- "charlie benante drum setup"
- "charlie benante drum kit"
- "anthrax drummer gear"
- "among the living drum setup"

This completes the classic Big 4 thrash coverage at the album level: Metallica (#1 by volume), Megadeth (Rust in Peace ✅), Slayer (Reign in Blood ✅) → Anthrax (MISSING).

## Article brief

**Slug:** \`charlie-benante-among-the-living-drum-setup\`  
**Type:** \`drummer-kit\` + album breakdown  
**Featured album:** *Among the Living* (1987)

**Drummer:** Charlie Benante  
**Band:** Anthrax  
**Genre:** Thrash metal

**Key gear (from drummer profile):**
- Drums: Tama (endorsee)
- Cymbals: Sabian (long-time endorsee)
- Signature crossover pad techniques adapted from jazz background
- Double bass dominant in later albums

**Content requirements:**
- ≥ 400 words
- FAQPage schema JSON-LD with 3 Q&As
- Internal links: Charlie Benante profile + Anthrax band page
- \`datePublished\` in albumArticles.js entry

## Files to touch

1. \`packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js\` — add entry with slug \`charlie-benante-among-the-living-drum-setup\`
2. Article content via standard article template
3. \`public/llms/articles/charlie-benante-among-the-living-drum-setup.md\` — LLM markdown companion

## Quality gate

- ≥ 400 words
- ≥ 3 FAQ Q&As verbatim-matching target queries
- Internal links: drummer profile + band page (/bands/anthrax)
- Album-specific gear details (not just general bio)
- \`datePublished\` in albumArticles.js

## Estimated organic uplift

Completes Big 4 thrash album coverage at article level. "Charlie Benante drum setup" and "Anthrax drummer kit" are natural search queries from the large thrash metal audience. Compounds existing Anthrax band page + Charlie Benante profile authority. Band-level query funnel: "anthrax drummer" → profile → article → gear purchase intent.

## Verify

1. \`/articles/charlie-benante-among-the-living-drum-setup\` returns 200
2. FAQPage schema visible in Google Rich Results Test
3. Sitemap includes article + LLM URLs
4. \`grep "charlie-benante" packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js\` → found (new entry)
5. LLM file at \`public/llms/articles/charlie-benante-among-the-living-drum-setup.md\` ≥ 200 words

## Done

Article live at /articles/charlie-benante-among-the-living-drum-setup with FAQPage schema + LLM companion file.
title: SEO: Charlie Benante (Anthrax) Among the Living drum setup article
